title: Fix version procedure loading toast
description: Selecting Procedures for a score version can show a Failed to load procedures toast without useful console detail. Diagnose and fix the version-scoped procedure loading path so it loads reliably and reports actionable errors.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Fixed by removing the invalid nested Procedure.task query. Procedures remain task-backed through Task.target, so the score procedure workbench now queries Procedure records and Task records separately, then hydrates procedure cards by matching procedure/run/<id> or procedure/<id>. Regression test covers stage/status propagation through that path.
